text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Special Olympics 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SPECIAL OLYMPICS OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides year-round sports training and athletic competition through a variety of Olympic-type events and programs. Volunteer opportunities available. 8313 SW Cirrus Drive Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Age 8 and older and identified as having an intellectual or cognitive disability by a medical professional Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 248-0600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPECIAL OLYMPICS OREGON SPECIAL OLYMPICS OREGON
